_description: State-by-state salary transparency requirements extracted from Knowledge-Base/compliance/salary-transparency.md. Used to validate that ad copy includes salary information when legally required.
_usage: Look up job location state. If state is in 'required' list and employer meets coverage threshold, salary MUST appear in at least one ad asset.

NY.requirement: Min/max annual salary or hourly range

HI.requirement: Hourly rate or range in posting

remote_job_rules.remote_anywhere_us: Apply strictest state rules (CA/CO/NY). Always include salary.
remote_job_rules.recommendation: Include salary range in ALL postings for simplicity and compliance.

nyc_additional.note: NYC law is separate from and in addition to NY State law
